name: godot-rust-marketplace
description: Complete development toolkit for Godot+Rust projects. 30 tools across 7 domains: build/verify, code analysis, project structure, GDScript-to-Rust migration, performance optimization, gdext patterns, and debug diagnostics.

plugins.name: godot-rust-harness
plugins.description: MCP server + Godot addon for AI-assisted Godot+Rust development. 30 tools: runtime verification, code analysis, project scanning, GDScript-to-Rust migration, performance suggestions, gdext pattern checking, and error diagnostics.
